dashboard.title: Inventory Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Manage your fresh selections and pantry staples with ease. Everything is looking crisp today.
dashboard.emptyDescription: Scan your first grocery receipt or upload a photo of your fresh produce to begin.

addItemModal.title: Add New Item
addItemModal.errorMessage: Failed to add item. Please try again.

deleteModal.title: Remove Item?
deleteModal.description: Are you sure you want to remove "{itemName}" from your inventory? This action cannot be undone.

intake.title: Intake Scanner
intake.subtitle: Digitize your grocery receipts or fresh produce and instantly update your inventory.
intake.dropSubtext: or click to browse from your device
intake.analyzingPanelSubtext: Looking for food items in your image.
intake.savedSubtext: Your items have been added to the inventory.
intake.emptySubtext: Upload an image to see recognized items here.

generator.title: Menu Generator
generator.subtitle: Intelligent pairings based on your freshly-stocked larder.
generator.emptyDescription: Click generate to let our AI build you a meal based on your current inventory.

errors.emptyPantry: Your pantry is empty. Add some items first!
errors.generateFailed: Failed to generate ideas. Make sure you have items in your inventory!
errors.saveFailed: Failed to save items to inventory.
